# SBDC Houston Center local routing

Review date: 2026-06-28
Organization: UH Texas Gulf Coast SBDC Network
Local area: Houston and Central/North Harris County
Office or partner: Houston Center SBDC

## BOSS routing summary
Use for local business advising in the Houston Center SBDC service area.

## Local service area
- Houston Center SBDC is located at 1455 West Loop South, Suite 900, Houston, Texas 77027.
- The page identifies Central and North Harris County service orientation.
- For ZIP 77084, verify exact address/county.

## Local services or resource types
- No-cost confidential business advising
- Startup planning
- Financing readiness
- Marketing and operations guidance
- Events and webinars

## Best-fit users
- Idea-stage entrepreneurs
- Pre-venture or startup users
- Existing businesses needing local advising
- Users not yet eligible for APEX

## BOSS intake questions
- What is your business ZIP code, county, and physical operating address?
- Are you operating from home, online, mobile, commercial space, or multiple locations?
- Are you looking for startup help, existing-business advising, funding readiness, contracts, permits, certifications, training, or mentoring?
- Is the business already legally formed and for-profit?

## Recommended next action
Ask for exact location and stage. If service area fits, route to Houston Center SBDC. If boundary is uncertain, route to Find Your SBDC.
